name: The Lunch Counter — Corner and Short Arm
description: The L-bend and its four short-arm stools, where David Richmond sits at the terminal stool nearest the store's south wall — the position most isolated from the others and most exposed to the crowd assembling in the adjacent candy-counter aisle.
atmosphericDetails: The wall at David's left shoulder — close enough to feel the faint warmth of the steam pipe running behind it
The sound of Ruth Carver's shopping bag handle creaking as she shifts her weight behind the stool
The 'Counter Closed' placard placed face-down on the short-arm section by a floor walker who has not yet decided whether to stand it upright
